**CFE**
**ខេមបូឌាន ហ្វែរវីន អ៊ិនធើប្រាយ ខមភេនី លីមីធីត**
**CAMBODIAN FAIRWIND ENTERPRISES COMPANY LIMITED**
Room 906-907, 9th Floor, Exchange Square, Street 106, Sangkat Wat Phnom, Khan Daun Penh, Kingdom of Cambodia
Tel: +855 8123 5001 Email: cfairwind@gmail.com

Mitigations to non-compliant design aspects
There are some items that are not entirely compliant with The Code, have been considered and risk assessed and accepted with the following modifications and/or risk mitigation measures:

1. Single emergency stairs
The technical requirement for buildings over ██████ per floor is that there are two emergency staircases. The ██████ building only has one, which is enclosed, but no smoke protected by smoke stop lobbies.

The main reason for not being able to install a second staircase is that the GFA per floor is small, at ██████, even though it is over the 200m2 threshold. Also, ██████ parking requirements, so any second stairs would not be able to access the ground in any case. Finally, the external finishing of the building is ██████ meaning that external emergency exits are not possible.

Combined with the difficulties of having a second emergency stairs, it is the assessment of CFE that this technical failure is mitigated by:

a. ██████ in the stairwell, automatically activated by ██████, over and above the smoke extraction system;
b. The excess floor area per floor being ██████ and above and, even then, being in excess ██████;
c. The owner undertaking to install good signage for emergency exit.

5

**ទំព័រទី ១៧៣ នៃ ១៧៦**
